study_title: Task-specific patterns of odorant receptor expression in worker antennae indicates a sensory filter regulating division of labor in ants
design: <1 g RNA from the sample was used to prepare cDNA libraries using the NEBNext Ultra RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina. rRNA was removed using the Ribo-Zero kit. mRNA was purified from total RNA using poly-T oligo-bound magnetic beads and randomly fragmented by addition of fragmentation buffer. cDNA was synthesized using an mRNA template and a random hexamer primer. Then, a custom buffer for second-strand synthesis (Illumina), dNTPs, RNase H, and DNA polymerase I were added to start second-strand synthesis. After a series of terminal repair, ligation, and sequencing adapter ligation reactions, the double-stranded cDNA library was completed by size selection and PCR enrichment

design: <1 g RNA from the sample was used to prepare cDNA libraries using the NEBNext Ultra RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina. rRNA was removed using the Ribo-Zero kit. mRNA was purified from total RNA using poly-T oligo-bound magnetic beads and randomly fragmented by addition of fragmentation buffer. cDNA was synthesized using an mRNA template and a random hexamer primer. Then, a custom buffer for second-strand synthesis (Illumina), dNTPs, RNase H, and DNA polymerase I were added to start second-strand synthesis. After a series of terminal repair, ligation, and sequencing adapter ligation reactions, the double-stranded cDNA library was completed by size selection and PCR enrichment
center: Johannes Gutenberg University Mainz
isolate: 7 antennae of nurses from the colony: NY18 J239
geo_loc_name: USA: Edmund Niles Huyck Preserve, Renssellearville, New York
isolation_source: natal colony of individual: NY18 J239

study_title: Transcriptomics of queen-worker pairs in slavemaking ants and its hosts
design: RNA extraction of all samples was conducted in September 2017 using the Nucleo-Spin Mini kit (Macherey-Nagel). For each species, we analyzed a pool of 6 workers and another pool of three queens. We extracted RNA from whole bodies, as we had no prior assumptions as to which tissue differed most strongly in gene expression between our groups.  Samples were shipped to StarSEQ (Mainz) for library preparation and 100bp paired-end sequencing on an Illumina HiSeq. In total, we obtained 15 million reads on average per sample.
center: University of Regensburg

study_title: Transcriptomics of Developmental Stages in Ants
exp_title: RNA-Seq of Temnothorax longispinosus: Male, Colony_A_72
design: RNA extraction of all samples was conducted in November 2016 using the RNAeasy mini extraction Kit (Qiagen, Inc.). For each species, we analyzed a medium-sized larva, an unpigmented worker pupa, a male, an adult worker, and a fertile queen from three different colonies each (N=30). We extracted RNA from whole bodies, as we had no prior assumptions as to which tissue differed most strongly in gene expression between our groups. To determine the sex of the larvae, we tested heterozygosity. For T. longispinosus the test shows clearly that all larvae are female. For T. americanus the samples show a heterogeneous pattern of heterozygosity, e.g., lowest heterozygosity in two of the queens, thus we cant clarify whether the larvae in this species are male or female. Library construction and sequencing was conducted at BGI Hong Kong on an Illumina HiSeq 4000. For rRNA depletion a poly-A selection was conducted. With a read length of 100 bp the libraries resulted in a total of 40 million paired-end reads (4 GB) for each sample.
center: University of Regensburg
geo_loc_name: USA: New York, Rensselaerville, Huyck Preserve

exp_title: RNA-Seq of Temnothorax longispinosus adult worker encountering Temnothorax americanus slavemaker

Sequence data was already cleaned by BGI by removing adapter sequences and low-quality reads.
